heading: Additional examiners, clerks, and other employees
label: 9 Additional examiners, clerks, and other employees
text: The Comptroller of the Currency is authorized to employ such additional examiners, clerks, and other employees as he deems necessary to carry out the provisions of sections 4, 6, 9, 10, 1151 to 1318, and 1322 of this title and to assign to duty in the office of his bureau in Washington such examiners and assistant examiners as he shall deem necessary to assist in the performance of the work of that bureau.

CodificationSection is comprised of subsec. (b), third sentence, of section 209 of act . For classification to this title of other provisions of section 209, see Tables.Mar. 4, 1923

Exception as to Transfer of FunctionsFunctions vested by any provision of law in Comptroller of the Currency, referred to in this section, not included in transfer of functions to Secretary of the Treasury, see note set out under .section 1 of this title
